default.en: What part of yourself are you ready to see more clearly now?
default.zh: 你现在准备好更清楚地看见自己的哪一部分？

18-110-27-07.en: Where in your life are you being asked to transform gently rather than through force?
18-110-27-07.zh: 在你生命中，哪里正在邀请你温柔地转化，而不是用力逼迫？

18.en: What pattern in your life keeps returning so you can transform it?
18.zh: 生命中什么模式反复出现，等待你去转化？

27.en: What relationship mirror is asking you to wake up rather than stay comfortable?
27.zh: 哪段关系镜像在邀请你觉醒，而不是停留在舒适？

7.en: Where do you still measure your worth by results instead of presence?
7.zh: 你还在哪里用结果，而不是存在本身来衡量价值？
